category_sources: source_facts.description says High-performance secure IRC server; official site says it helps users host their own IRC server, and GitHub README calls it an internet relay chat daemon.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ircd-hybrid; official site and repository use ircd-hybrid.
docs_sources: Official site is the main support/download surface; official GitHub README links installation information and repository docs such as INSTALL.md and doc/.
repo_sources: Official downloads page lists anonymous SVN checkout for the ircd-hybrid 8.2.x branch; it also says GitHub is only a mirror of the working repositories.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says IRC server; official GitHub README says lightweight high-performance internet relay chat daemon for POSIX systems.
